intention: 样式被强制覆盖了（前端/CSS 场景）
sentencePatterns: The [element] styles were forcibly overridden by [something].
It looks like [element] styles have been forcibly overridden.
realLifeExamples: The menu bar styles were forcibly overridden after the library update.
The button styles were forcibly overridden by a third-party plugin.
usageNotes: In frontend/CSS contexts, overridden is more precise than modified — styles are typically overridden (covered by a higher-specificity rule), not edited in place. Use forcibly to indicate it happened without intent or authorization.
productionPrompts: 用 were forcibly overridden 描述一个样式被意外覆盖的前端 bug。
